## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Executive Assistant role at GrowthX with candidate Cindy Castillejo, providing organizational context and exploring her background.](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has a two-sided organization: sales/engineering and client deliverables, with Matthew running the latter](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The role is evolving and offers room for growth, focusing on calendar management, outreach, and team coordination](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Cindy's background in startups, PR, and relationship-building aligns well with the position's needs](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [GrowthX emphasizes automation and AI tools to streamline workflows and increase efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Organizational Structure

  - [Two-sided organization: sales/engineering and client deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Deliverables side structure:](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
      - [5 directors (10-15 clients each)](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
      - [7-8 managing editors (1-5 clients each)](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [12+ content managers (1-2 per client)](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Company focuses on scaled content creation across various verticals](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [12-week onboarding program for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)

### Managing Editor Role

  - [Team management: oversee 5-6 content managers](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Client-facing responsibilities:](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - [Liaise with client point of contact](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [Provide progress updates on content creation and metrics](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [Offer strategic insights and new product suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Adapt strategies based on client needs and market changes](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### Matthew's Responsibilities

  - [Oversee deliverables side of the business](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Work with leadership on company direction and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [External-facing duties:](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [Establish new lines of business](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [Participate in sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [Handle client escalations](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Involvement in community engagement:](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [Speaking engagements](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [Podcasts](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [Events and webinars](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### Cindy's Background

  - [6 years of experience as an assistant in startups](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Worked at Dieux (skincare company) as first employee](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
      - [Collaborated with PR team](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
      - [Handled customer service inquiries](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Recent experience at an architectural firm](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Built relationships with publishers](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
      - [Developed social media strategy](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Contributed to architect winning a major award](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### Role Evolution and Automation

  - [Position expected to change as company grows](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Focus on automation and AI tools for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [Example: Automating meeting attendee dossiers](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Company encourages automation across all departments](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Documentation-heavy environment using Notion](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve organization of director-level documentation](https://fathom.video/share/gJ_717F_43Bcc9YAVnESEYA5wYVQZ-Ri?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
